title: build-using-dockerfile,commit: disable compression by default
body: When committing an image to local storage, compressing the new layers only wastes time because they need to be decompressed again when being written to local storage.

comments.body: Awesome change, @nalind! As Dan mentions above, this change impacts the blob cache tests.
